248.reason: // Error: if '&' is the last character on the line, this condition fails and no error is recorded for the single '&'.

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 0.5 , reason:  // Error: if '&' is the last character on the line, this condition fails and no error is recorded for the single '&'.
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 0.5 , reason:  Missing handling when curpos >= line.length() (i.e., '&' at end of line): should record error type 'a' and create token.

260.reason: // Error: similarly, if '|' is the last character, the error is not reported.

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 0.5 , reason:  // Error: similarly, if '|' is the last character, the error is not reported.
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 0.5 , reason:  Same issue: if '|' is the last character on the line, no error is recorded and no token is generated.

265.reason: When '/' is the last character of the line, the code falls through without setting name/lexType or incrementing curpos properly for the token addition below, but more critically, if it's just a DIV at end of line, it needs to add token. The current structure adds a token at the end of the loop regardless. However, if curpos >= length after incrementing, the next iteration of while(true) will skip spaces and hit curpos >= length return. But the token.add is executed *after* this if-else block. If we enter this block, curpos was incremented. If it was just '/', name and lexType are set. Then token is added. This seems okay for DIV.

reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 1.0 , reason:  When '/' is the last character of the line, the code falls through without setting name/lexType or incrementing curpos properly for the token addition below, but more critically, if it's just a DIV at end of line, it needs to add token. The current structure adds a token at the end of the loop regardless. However, if curpos >= length after incrementing, the next iteration of while(true) will skip spaces and hit curpos >= length return. But the token.add is executed *after* this if-else block. If we enter this block, curpos was incremented. If it was just '/', name and lexType are set. Then token is added. This seems okay for DIV.
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 1.0 , reason:  Missing else branch: when '/' is the last character of the line, it should be treated as DIV token, but currently the code does nothing, causing the token not to be added and potentially leading to infinite loop or missing output.

263.reason: [Incorrectly assigns LexType.AND for single '&'; should not assign a valid token type when an error occurs]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-1: 0.5 , reason:  [Incorrectly assigns LexType.AND for single '&'; should not assign a valid token type when an error occurs]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 0.5 , reason:  [Incorrectly assigns LexType.AND to a single '&', which is invalid; should not create a token at all when an error occurs]

277.reason: [Incorrectly assigns LexType.OR for single '|'; should not assign a valid token type when an error occurs]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-1: 0.5 , reason:  [Incorrectly assigns LexType.OR for single '|'; should not assign a valid token type when an error occurs]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 0.5 , reason:  [Incorrectly assigns LexType.OR to a single '|', which is invalid; should not create a token at all when an error occurs]
